message:
fix(security): sanitize --subject/--args before NudgePane injection (gt-sec-002)

Add sanitizeNudgeField() to strip control characters (newlines, CR, null, ESC,
U+0000-U+001F, U+007F) and cap at 200 chars for user-supplied fields injected
into tmux panes via NudgePane. Applied to both subject and args in
injectStartPrompt() before the NudgePane call.

Closes #3125

Co-Authored-By: Chris Deal <cdeal@mines.edu>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
